messages.table_not_found: Cannot delete board because the board table does not exist

copy.title: Copy Board
copy.message: Would you like to copy '{{name}}' board?
copy.info: ※ Only board settings will be copied, posts will not be copied.

delete.title: Delete Board
delete.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete '{{name}}' board?
delete.with_posts_info: This board has {{posts_count}} post(s) and comments.
delete.force_delete_label_with_posts: Permanent Delete (Delete all posts, comments, and attachments)
delete.force_delete_warning_with_posts: Permanent deletion will remove all data irreversibly. Please backup your data before deletion.
delete.force_delete_warning_no_posts: This action cannot be undone. The board and all related data will be completely removed.
delete.backup_notice: It is recommended to backup your database before deletion to prevent data loss.

cancel_confirm.title: Unsaved Changes
cancel_confirm.message: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to leave this page?

form.read_only_message: You have read-only access. Contact an administrator if you need to make changes.

blocked_keywords.label: Blocked Keywords
blocked_keywords.description: Inappropriate words or keywords to exclude

max_file_count.label: Maximum File Count
max_file_count.hint: Up to {{max}} files can be uploaded

new_display_hours.label: New Post Display Period
new_display_hours.hint: Hours to display [New] badge after post creation

max_comment_depth.label: Max Comment Depth
max_comment_depth.hint: Enter a value between {{min}} and {{max}}. Setting to 0 disables the nested comment feature.

notify_author.label: Author Email Notification
notify_author.description: Send email to author for comments, replies, and admin actions

notify_admin_on_post.label: Admin Email Notification
notify_admin_on_post.description: Send email to admin when a post is created

notification_channels.label: Notification Channels
notification_channels.description: Select channels to receive board notifications

placeholders.name: e.g., Notice Board
placeholders.description: Briefly describe the purpose of this board

descriptions.slug: Used for URL and table name (letters, numbers, hyphens only)
descriptions.description: Description displayed to users in the board list
descriptions.is_active: Inactive boards will not be displayed on user pages
descriptions.categories_notice: Deleting a category will not affect its posts. They can be found using the 'Unclassified' filter.
descriptions.show_view_count: Display view count in list and detail pages
descriptions.use_comment: When enabled, you can configure detailed comment settings (length, depth, order).
descriptions.use_reply: When enabled, you can set the maximum reply depth.
descriptions.use_report: Enable report feature for inappropriate posts/comments
descriptions.type: Board types can be managed in Settings > Basic Settings.

permissions.managers_description: Managers have full permissions for this board.
permissions.admin_permissions_description: Permissions for accessing admin pages. Assigned to board managers and system administrators.
permissions.user_permissions_description: User access permissions for the board. Detailed permissions are controlled through roles.
permissions.settings_description: Select roles to assign to each permission. If no roles are selected, all users are allowed.
permissions.error_description: Please select at least one role for each permission.
permissions.search_placeholder: Search by name or email (Shows up to 20 results, please be specific)
permissions.steps_description: Steps have all permissions except board management permission.
permissions.auto_role_notice: Board manager and step roles are included as default values for each permission upon creation and can be modified below.
permissions.create_mode_permissions_notice: Role-based access control can be configured in the edit screen after creating the board. Default permissions are automatically applied during creation.

category_remove.title: Remove Category
category_remove.message: Are you sure you want to remove '{{category}}' category?

menu.manual_guide: Enter the path below in Menu Management to register.

reports.page_description: View and manage reported posts and comments.

modals.status_change_pending_confirm: Change {{count}} selected item(s) to received status?
modals.status_change_pending_confirm_single: Change this report to received status?
modals.status_change_review_confirm: Change {{count}} selected item(s) to review status?
modals.status_change_review_confirm_single: Change this report to review status?
modals.status_change_rejected_confirm: Change {{count}} selected item(s) to rejected status?
modals.status_change_rejected_confirm_single: Change this report to rejected status?
modals.status_change_deleted_confirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete {{count}} selected item(s)? Deleted posts cannot be recovered.
modals.status_change_deleted_confirm_single: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this report? Deleted content cannot be recovered.
modals.deleted_warning: {{count}} permanently deleted item(s) cannot be changed.
modals.same_status_warning: {{count}} item(s) already in {{status}} status cannot be changed.
modals.blinded_will_be_public: {{count}} blinded content(s) will be made public.
modals.changeable_warning_with_deleted: Would you like to change {{count}} changeable report(s) to {{status}} status?
modals.changeable_warning_no_deleted: Would you like to change {{count}} selected report(s) to {{status}} status?
modals.all_deleted_warning_message: Permanently deleted reports cannot have their status changed.
modals.all_unchangeable_warning_message: All selected reports are unchangeable. (Permanently deleted or already in the same status)
modals.permanent_delete_warning: Once permanently deleted, posts cannot be recovered.
modals.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this report? This action cannot be undone and all related data will be permanently deleted.

detail.page_description: View and manage detailed information about reported posts or comments.
detail.alert_message_pending: This report has not been processed yet. Please review and take appropriate action.
detail.alert_message_review: This report is currently under review. Please complete additional review and make final decision.
detail.alert_message_resolved: This report has been successfully resolved.
detail.alert_message_suspended: The reported content has been suspended.
detail.alert_message_deleted: The reported content has been permanently deleted and cannot be recovered.

modals.review_description: Please review the report and provide a reason for processing.
modals.reject_description: Please provide a reason for rejecting this report.
modals.suspend_description: Please provide a reason for suspending this post/comment.

messages.review_success: Review process has been completed successfully.

detail.title: Post Detail
detail.no_comments: No comments yet. Be the first to comment!
detail.guest_password_verify_message: Please enter the password to edit your post.
detail.reply_blocked_blinded_post: Cannot write a reply post to a blinded post.
detail.reply_blocked_deleted_post: Cannot write a reply post to a deleted post.
detail.blinded_description: This post has been hidden according to our policy
detail.blinded_comment_description: This comment has been hidden according to our policy
detail.restore_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to restore this post?

delete_modal.confirm_post: Are you sure you want to delete this post?
delete_modal.confirm_reply: Are you sure you want to delete this reply?
delete_modal.confirm_comment: Are you sure you want to delete this comment?

blind_modal.title: Blind Post
blind_modal.reason_placeholder: Enter the reason for blinding (minimum 10 characters)

report_modal.title: Report Post
report_modal.warning_notice: Reports cannot be cancelled. Please check carefully before reporting. Do you want to proceed?
report_modal.reason_placeholder: Enter the specific reason for reporting
report_modal.warning: ⚠️ Reports cannot be cancelled. Please decide carefully.

form.read_only_message: You have read-only access. Contact an administrator if you need to make changes.
form.author: Author Name
form.notice_description: Pin this post to the top of the board
form.secret_post_always: This board always writes as secret posts
form.secret_description: Only viewable by author and administrators
form.title: Title
form.no_content_preview: Preview will appear when you enter content
form.confirm_remove_attachment_message: The file will be deleted immediately. This action cannot be undone regardless of saving the post.
form.attachments_limit: Max 5 files, 10MB each (jpg, jpeg, png, gif, pdf, zip)
form.drop_files_or_click: Click to upload or drag and drop

modals.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this post? This action cannot be undone.
modals.blind_confirm: Are you sure you want to blind this post? Blinded posts will not be visible to regular users.
modals.blind_comment_confirm: Are you sure you want to blind this comment? Blinded comments will not be visible to regular users.
modals.restore_confirm: Are you sure you want to restore this post? Restored posts will be visible to regular users again.
modals.restore_comment_confirm: Are you sure you want to restore this comment? Restored comments will be visible to regular users again.

settings.title: Board Settings
settings.description: Configure default settings for new boards and manage global board policies.
settings.read_only_message: You have read-only access. Contact an administrator if you need to make changes.
settings.page_info: Manage default settings applied when creating new boards. Check the checkbox next to each item to bulk-apply it to existing boards.

sections.general_description: Settings applied immediately across all boards on the user-facing pages
sections.basic_description: Default settings applied when creating a new board. These can be changed individually per board, and the 'Bulk Apply' feature allows you to apply them to existing boards as well.
sections.permissions_description: Default permissions applied when creating a new board
sections.list_description: Settings related to the board list page
sections.report_description: Settings related to the report feature
sections.report_policy_description: Configure automatic report handling and restriction policies
sections.auto_hide_description: Automatically blind posts/comments when reports exceed a threshold.
sections.report_abuse_prevention_description: Limit daily reports per user and block reporting when rejections accumulate. Applied globally across all boards.
sections.spam_security_description: Configure cooldowns and view count security settings
sections.report_notification_description: Configure which administrators receive notifications and how notifications are sent when a report is submitted.
sections.report_permissions_description: Assign roles that can view the report list and process reports (approve, reject, or blind). Admin notifications for new reports are sent based on the 'Process Reports Permission' role.

fields.new_display_hours_hint: Duration to display [New] badge after posting (1-720)
fields.max_comment_depth_hint: Enter a value between 0 and 10. Setting to 0 disables the nested comment feature.
fields.allowed_extensions_placeholder: Type extension and press Enter (e.g., jpg, png, pdf)
fields.notify_admin_on_post_description: Send email to admin when a post is submitted
fields.notify_author_description: Send email to the original author when a comment or reply is posted
fields.auto_hide_threshold_hint: Automatically blind content when reports reach this count. (0=disabled, 1–100)
fields.auto_hide_target_hint: Select the target for auto blind processing.
fields.daily_report_limit_hint: Max reports per user per day across all boards. 0 = no limit. (0–100)
fields.rejection_limit_hint: Reporting will be blocked when rejections exceed the limit within this period. 0 count = no limit. (Count: 0–50, Period: 1–365 days)
fields.report_cooldown_seconds_hint: Minimum interval between consecutive reports. 0 = no limit. (0–3600 sec)
fields.notify_author_on_report_action_descripti: Send a notification to the author when their content is processed (blinded/deleted/restored) due to reports
fields.notify_admin_on_report_description: Sends a notification to administrators with the 'Process Reports Permission' when a report is submitted. The number of notifications sent depends on the scope setting below.
fields.notify_admin_on_report_scope_per_report: Every time a report is submitted
fields.report_view_roles_description: Permission to view the report list and report details.
fields.report_manage_roles_description: Permission to approve, reject, or blind reports. Admin notifications on report submission are also sent to roles with this permission.
fields.blocked_keywords_description: List of keywords to block in posts and comments
fields.blocked_keywords_hint: Posts or comments containing registered keywords will be blocked
fields.post_cooldown_seconds_hint: Wait time between consecutive posts by the same user (0–3600 sec, 0 = no limit)
fields.comment_cooldown_seconds_hint: Wait time between consecutive comments by the same user (0–3600 sec, 0 = no limit)
fields.spam_security_identifier_info: Cooldown and view count deduplication identify members by user_id and guests by IP address
fields.view_count_cache_ttl_hint: Cache duration for view count deduplication (60–604800 sec, max 7 days)
fields.date_display_format_hint: Choose how dates are displayed in post and comment lists. Applied immediately across all boards on the user-facing pages.

descriptions.type: Set the default display format for new boards
descriptions.secret_mode: Set the default behavior for the secret post feature
descriptions.show_view_count: Display view count on post list and detail pages
descriptions.use_report: Enable reporting of inappropriate posts and comments
descriptions.new_display_hours: Duration to display [New] badge after posting (in hours)
descriptions.per_page: Number of posts to display per page on desktop
descriptions.per_page_mobile: Number of posts to display per page on mobile
descriptions.order_by: Set the default sort criteria for the post list
descriptions.order_direction: Set the default sort direction for the post list
descriptions.min_title_length: Set the minimum character count for post titles
descriptions.max_title_length: Set the maximum character count for post titles
descriptions.min_content_length: Set the minimum character count for post content
descriptions.max_content_length: Set the maximum character count for post content
descriptions.use_reply: Must be ON to apply reply post feature to new boards.
descriptions.max_reply_depth: Set the maximum nesting depth for replies (1-5)
descriptions.blocked_keywords: Posts or comments containing registered keywords will be blocked
descriptions.use_comment: Must be ON to apply comment feature to new boards. Comment detail settings below will also apply.
descriptions.comment_order: Set the default sort direction for comments
descriptions.min_comment_length: Set the minimum character count for comments
descriptions.max_comment_length: Set the maximum character count for comments
descriptions.max_comment_depth: Set the maximum nesting depth for nested comments. Setting to 0 disables the nested comment feature (0-10)
descriptions.use_file_upload: Must be ON to apply file attachment feature to new boards.
descriptions.max_file_size: Maximum file size for uploads (in MB)
descriptions.max_file_count: Maximum number of files per post
descriptions.allowed_extensions: Leave empty to allow all file extensions

date_display_format.standard_description: Recent posts show as 'N min ago / N hours ago', this year as 'MM-DD', older as 'YY-MM-DD'
date_display_format.relative_description: All dates shown as relative time (N min · N hours · N days · N months · N years ago)
date_display_format.relative_example: e.g. 3 min ago · 2 hours ago · 5 days ago · 3 months ago · 2 years ago

permissions_table.title: Default Permissions
permissions_table.description: Set which roles can access each permission.
permissions_table.bulk_apply_notice: When bulk applying, the selected permissions will replace the existing roles of each board with the current settings. However, the manager and step roles of each board are preserved as-is.

bulk_apply.title: Bulk Apply to Existing Boards
bulk_apply.description: Apply the above settings to existing boards. Select items and target boards to apply.
bulk_apply.checked_fields_notice: All settings will be saved, then only the checked items will be bulk applied.
bulk_apply.no_boards_notice: No boards available for bulk apply. Please create a board first.

notification_definitions.title: Notification Settings
notification_definitions.description: Manage notification templates for board. You can customize the subject and body for each notification type.
notification_definitions.toggle_success: Notification active status has been changed.
notification_definitions.reset_success: Notification has been reset to default.

bulk_apply_modal.title: Confirm Bulk Apply
bulk_apply_modal.message: All settings will be saved, then the checked items will be bulk applied. This action cannot be undone.
bulk_apply_modal.message_all: All settings will be saved, then the checked items will be bulk applied. This action cannot be undone.
bulk_apply_modal.warning: This action cannot be undone. Existing settings of the target boards will be overwritten.
bulk_apply_modal.select_boards_required: Please select at least one board.
bulk_apply_modal.save_and_apply_info: Upon confirmation, all settings in the current tab will be saved, and only the checked items will be bulk applied to the selected boards.
bulk_apply_modal.save_error: Failed to save settings. Bulk apply has been cancelled.
bulk_apply_modal.permission_notice: The selected permission items will replace the existing roles of each board with the current settings. However, the manager and step roles of each board are preserved as-is.

board_types.name: Name
board_types.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this type?
board_types.slug_hint: Only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens (-) allowed. Must start with a lowercase letter. (e.g., basic, gallery, photo-card)
board_types.usage_guide: The slug is an identifier that distinguishes the board display type. You must add and configure a dedicated layout for the slug in the template for it to take effect.

inquiry.description: You can designate the board to use as the product inquiry board.
inquiry.hint_secret: ℹ A board with the secret post feature enabled is recommended.
inquiry.go_to_board_edit_desc: Change detailed board settings such as secret post options, read/write permissions, and categories.
inquiry.hint_category: ℹ If you set up categories on the board, users can select a category when submitting an inquiry.
inquiry.go_to_posts_desc: View and respond to product inquiries submitted by customers. Add this board to the admin sidebar menu for quicker access.
inquiry.add_to_admin_menu_desc: Adds a posts management item for this board to the sidebar admin menu.
